closure_rules.physical_fact_closure: At least one directly applicable, verified authoritative OEM source, with zero unresolved conflicting authoritative sources, supplemented by physical confirmation once a GRADE-A or GRADE-B reference vehicle is inspected.
closure_rules.project_specification_closure: Visual and geometric modeling tolerances (e.g., visual_model_error <= 2.0 mm) must be justified by delivery requirements and target capture capabilities, rather than being forced to match nominal OEM blueprint tolerances.
closure_rules.visual_acceptance_closure: Rendered shader parameters (roughness, metallic, coating type) must be mapped to PROVISIONAL_VISUAL_TUNING and calibrated through controlled reference photography under consistent lighting conditions.
